case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) VS. CARLOS BENITO BOYER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CARLOS BENITO BOYER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYER, CARLOS BENITO $2,415.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED APR-20-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, CARLOS BENITO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, CARLOS BENITO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2016. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2016 AT 10:00 AM. IN DEPT. 506. FOR PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
